# Canonical Definitions

Single source of truth for ChittyOS agents, skills, and hooks.

**The rule:** edit only files in this directory. Every projected runtime file (Claude Code agents, Codex skills, OpenClaw agents, etc.) is generated by `chittyagent-dispatch` from the canonical here.

## Layout

```
canonical/
  <name>.md                    # one canonical doc per definition
  .runtimes.json               # runtime adapter registry
  .dispatch-state/<name>.json  # last-projected sentinel per definition
  .dispatch-log.jsonl          # append-only audit log of dispatch runs
```

## Frontmatter schema

See `plugins/chittyagent-dispatch/agents/chittyagent-dispatch.md` ("Canonical Document Format" section) for the binding frontmatter contract.

## Workflow

1. **Edit** a canonical here.
2. **Run** `plugins/chittyagent-dispatch/scripts/dispatch.sh sync <name>` — projects to every runtime listed in the canonical's `runtimes:` array.
3. **Commit** the projection diffs alongside the canonical edit (or use `--in-place` for the dispatch agent to commit them as a separate dispatch-sync commit).

## Direct edits to projected files

Forbidden by convention. If you find yourself editing `~/.claude/plugins/.../agents/<X>.md` or `~/.codex/skills/<X>/SKILL.md` directly, stop and:

1. Open the canonical at `canonical/<X>.md` instead.
2. Make your edit there.
3. Run `dispatch.sh sync <X>`.

If you've already made a direct edit, run `dispatch.sh reconcile <X>` — it'll detect the drift, surface a three-way diff, and let you promote your change to canonical.

## Status

v0.1 skeleton. Migration of existing agents/skills into this directory is pending; today most definitions still live in their per-runtime locations. The migration will be done one canonical at a time as `chittyagent-dispatch` adapters land.
